steps.title: Calculate Charles's weekly savings
steps.content:
Charles saves $\frac{4}{5}$ of \$230 each week. Calculate this amount:
$$\text{Weekly savings} = \frac{4}{5} \times 230 = \frac{4 \times 230}{5} = \frac{920}{5} = 184$$
Charles saves \$184 each week.

steps.title: Calculate total savings over 3 weeks
steps.content:
Multiply the weekly savings by 3:
$$\text{Total savings} = 184 \times 3 = 552$$
Charles will save \$552 in 3 weeks.
